scripts.test:coverage: node scripts/run_python.mjs scripts/run_backend_tests.py all --coverage && npm --prefix frontend run test:json
scripts.test:all: node scripts/run_python.mjs scripts/run_backend_tests.py all --coverage && npm --prefix frontend run test:json && npm --prefix frontend run test:e2e && node scripts/run_python.mjs scripts/generate_test_report.py
